mapper.insert: INSERT INTO legal_article_explanation_feedback (article_id, explanation_id, user_id, helpful, reason, content, status, created_at) VALUES (#{articleId}, #{explanationId}, #{userId}, #{helpful}, #{reason}, #{content}, 'pending', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT f.id, f.article_id, f.explanation_id, f.user_id, f.helpful, f.reason, f.content, f.status, f.created_at, f.handled_at, a.article_number, a.title AS article_title, d.name AS document_name, u.username, u.phone FROM legal_article_explanation_feedback f LEFT JOIN legal_article a ON a.id = f.article_id LEFT JOIN legal_document d ON d.id = a.document_id LEFT JOIN users u ON u.user_id = f.user_id ORDER BY CASE WHEN f.status = 'pending' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, f.created_at DESC, f.id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE legal_article_explanation_feedback SET status = 'handled', handled_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
